    - Curate. Link only your genuinely important pages, not every URL.

    - Regenerate from your content source at build time so it never drifts.
    - Everything here must match what humans see. No hidden or extra claims.
  Delete this comment before shipping.
-->
# Your Project Name

> One or two plain sentences: what this tool is, and who it is for.

## Start here
- [Docs](https://your-tool.org/docs): what the documentation covers
- [Quickstart](https://your-tool.org/start): running in five minutes
- [Demo](https://your-tool.org/demo): try it live

## Reference
- [API reference](https://your-tool.org/api): endpoints, parameters, schemas
- [Examples](https://your-tool.org/examples): worked, copyable tasks

## About
- [About](https://your-tool.org/about): the project, its people, how to cite it

## Optional
- [Changelog](https://your-tool.org/changelog): what changed and when
